title: Chaetogastra ciliaris
taxonomy: Chaetogastra ciliaris is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the tribe Heliantheae. Chaetogastra ciliaris is further classified as a member of the genus Chaetogastra, which is a group of plants native to the Americas. The classification of Chaetogastra ciliaris reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Asteraceae family. As a member of the Heliantheae tribe, Chaetogastra ciliaris is part of a diverse group of flowering plants that include sunflowers and daisies.
